ham.subject: April Marketing Update – New Products & Discounts Inside
ham.body:
Hello valued customer,

We hope you’re having a great month! We’re excited to share our latest product launches and exclusive offers just for you.

🚀 New Arrival: SmartFit Fitness Tracker – now with a 30‑day free trial.
💬 Bundle Deal: Buy 2 Yoga Mats, get 15% off the third.
🎁 Special: Sign up for our newsletter and receive a 20% coupon for your next purchase.

Check out the full details on our website: <URL>

Thank you for being part of our community. Stay fit, stay stylish!

Best regards,
The FitLife Team

spam.subject: URGENT: System Maintenance Required – Verify Your Account Now
spam.body:
Dear User,

Our IT support team has detected an anomaly in your account that requires immediate action. Please verify your credentials to avoid service disruption.

Steps to verify:
1. Open the official portal: <URL>
2. Enter your user ID and password.
3. Click on "Verify Now".
4. Follow the on-screen instructions.

If you do not complete this within 24 hours, your access will be temporarily suspended.

For assistance, reply to this email or call our helpdesk at 1800-123-IT.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
